label: Function
description: a rule assigning each input exactly one output

label: Limit
description: the value a function approaches as its input approaches a point

label: Continuity
description: a function with no abrupt jumps; small input changes give small output changes

label: Derivative
description: the instantaneous rate of change of a function

label: Integral
description: the accumulated area under a function

label: Gradient
description: the vector of partial derivatives pointing in the direction of steepest increase

label: Vector space
description: a set of vectors closed under addition and scalar multiplication

label: Basis
description: a linearly independent set of vectors that spans a vector space

label: Linear independence
description: vectors none of which is a linear combination of the others

label: Linear transformation
description: a map between vector spaces preserving addition and scalar multiplication

label: Matrix
description: a rectangular array of numbers representing a linear map

label: Determinant
description: a scalar encoding how a linear map scales volume, and whether it is invertible

label: Eigenvalue
description: a scalar by which an eigenvector is scaled under a linear map

label: Eigenvector
description: a nonzero vector whose direction is unchanged by a linear map

label: Set
description: a collection of distinct objects

label: Group
description: a set with an associative operation, an identity, and inverses

label: Series
description: the sum of the terms of a sequence

label: Probability
description: a measure between 0 and 1 of how likely an event is

label: Force
description: an influence that changes the motion of an object

label: Energy
description: the capacity to do work

label: Momentum
description: mass times velocity; conserved in isolated systems

label: Velocity
description: the rate of change of position, with direction

label: Acceleration
description: the rate of change of velocity

label: Wave
description: a disturbance that transfers energy through a medium or space

label: Entropy
description: a measure of disorder or of energy unavailable for work

label: Field
description: a physical quantity defined at every point in space

label: Algorithm
description: a finite sequence of well-defined steps that solves a problem

label: Time complexity
description: how an algorithm's running time grows with input size

label: Recursion
description: a procedure defined in terms of itself

label: Data structure
description: a way of organizing data for efficient access and modification

label: Graph
description: a set of nodes connected by edges

label: Hash table
description: a structure mapping keys to values via a hash function

label: Atom
description: the smallest unit of an element that retains its properties

label: Molecule
description: two or more atoms bonded together

label: Chemical reaction
description: a process that transforms reactants into products

label: Cell
description: the basic structural and functional unit of life

label: Gene
description: a unit of heredity encoded in DNA

label: Evolution
description: change in the heritable traits of populations over generations
